Sub: Undertaking regarding Original (Windows) 
Ref : GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated : 05-03-2026 
Dear Sir/ Ma’am 
 
We, M/s HP India Sales Pvt Ltd who are established and reputed manufacturer of Desktops, Notebook 
& Workstations having factory at HP India Sales Pvt Ltd., Plot No. 3, Phase II, SIPCOT INDUSTRIAL 
PARK DTA Sandavellur C Village, Sriperumbudur Taluk, Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu -602106, do hereby 
confirm that the HP will be supplied with Preloaded Original OS (Windows) as required basis the 
Technical Specifications published in the bid. 
 
However, partner needs to resubmit the confirmation from OEM on preloaded OS once the tender got 
awarded and material supplied to end customer by HP authorized partner 
 
 
For and on Behalf of HP India Sales Pvt Ltd

Dear Sir/Ma’am, 
 
With reference to above mentioned Gem bid no GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated : 05-3-2026.  
 
Please find below supporting links of for your kind perusal. 
 
1. The OEM must have an online system hardware diagnostics facility or a BIOS-based 
hardware diagnostics facility. OEM must have the facility to download the updates of 
preinstalled Software, device drivers and firmware from its website. – following are the links 
for checking. 
 
• 
https://support.hp.com/in-en/check-warranty 
• 
https://support.hp.com/in-en/help/hp-pc-hardware-diagnostics 
• 
https://support.hp.com/us-en/document/ish_2025988-1592331-16
